description: Curated security questionnaire questions mapped to HIPAA/NIST controls. Based on common SIG, CAIQ, and vendor security questionnaire patterns.

questions.question: Do you encrypt all electronic protected health information (ePHI) at rest?
Do you encrypt ePHI in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher?
Do you have role-based access controls for systems containing ePHI?
Do you enforce multi-factor authentication for access to ePHI systems?
Do you maintain audit logs of access to ePHI?
Do you have automatic session timeout for systems with ePHI?
Do you have unique user identification for all users accessing ePHI?
Do you have an emergency access procedure for ePHI systems?
Have you conducted a risk assessment within the last 12 months?
Do you have a designated HIPAA Security Officer?
Do all workforce members receive HIPAA security training upon hire and annually?
Do you have written security policies and procedures?
Do you have an incident response plan for security breaches?
Do you perform background checks on workforce members with access to ePHI?
Do you have procedures for terminating access when workforce members leave?
Do you have a sanctions policy for workforce members who violate security policies?
Do you regularly review audit logs for unauthorized access to ePHI?
Do you have a data backup plan and test it regularly?
Do you have a disaster recovery plan for ePHI systems?
Do you have Business Associate Agreements with all vendors that handle ePHI?
Do you have facility access controls for areas where ePHI is stored or accessed?
Do you have workstation use and security policies?
Do you have device and media disposal procedures for equipment containing ePHI?
Do you maintain an inventory of all systems that store, process, or transmit ePHI?
Do you perform vulnerability scanning on systems containing ePHI?
Do you have a change management process for ePHI systems?
Do you restrict physical access to ePHI to authorized individuals only?
Do you have procedures for reporting security incidents to HHS when required?
Do you review and update your risk assessment when significant changes occur?
Do you have minimum necessary policies limiting ePHI access to what is needed for job functions?
